ember_guard.name: Ember Guard
ember_guard.description: Summon a small protective ember that softens incoming attacks.

cinder_lash.name: Cinder Lash
cinder_lash.description: Strike with a controlled lash of flame that delivers consistent, focused damage.

purge_spark.name: Purge Spark
purge_spark.description: Release a cleansing spark that purifies minor disruptions and lowers corruption.

flame_screen.name: Flame Screen
flame_screen.description: Erect a heated barrier that reduces damage and lightly burns attackers.

firewall_pulse.name: Firewall Pulse
firewall_pulse.description: Emit a purifying pulse that weakens corrupted foes and strengthens your defenses.

heatwave_break.name: Heatwave Break
heatwave_break.description: Send out a controlled heatwave that slows the target and disrupts their next move.

aegis_flare.name: Aegis Flare
aegis_flare.description: Form a radiant flare shield that strengthens defenses and reflects a portion of damage.

sear_protocol.name: Sear Protocol
sear_protocol.description: Execute a precise flame-logic strike that deals extra damage to corrupted targets.

purity_brand.name: Purity Brand
purity_brand.description: Mark the target with a purification seal that strips enhancements and applies anti-corruption pressure.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Firewall technique reserved for future awakening.
